steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: This is a Text Structure and Purpose question. The task is to identify the overall structure of the text — what it introduces first and what it does second.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It depicts the meeting of a group of Black theater professionals and then acknowledges the obstacles they faced in their attempts to establish a theater company.': The text does describe NEC founders meeting, but never mentions any obstacles they faced. ✗
  • Choice B — 'It outlines the similarities between two plays and then considers how these plays were important to the founding of a theater company.': The text mentions Eden and A Raisin in the Sun, but does not compare them or discuss their importance to NEC's founding. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It refers to the production of a play and then examines the theater company responsible for that production.': The text opens with Steve Carter's play Eden being produced by NEC, then shifts to describe NEC — its founders, origin, and mission. This matches the two-part structure exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — 'It summarizes the impact of two plays by Black playwrights and then details the history of the theater company that produced them.': The text does not summarize the impact of any play, and A Raisin in the Sun was not produced by NEC. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
